description_long: This object is a classic, vintage-style alarm clock with a round, red metal body and two large black metal bells on top. The front features a white clock face with black Arabic numerals and black hour, minute, and second hands, as well as a small metal hammer between the bells for ringing. The red surface of the body is decorated with dark, weathered spots and scratches, giving it a worn, urban look. The top has a curved, arched handle connecting the two bells, and the back is solid red with more visible wear and no visible controls. The base is flat with two small black feet for stability. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for placement in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or street-side stalls.
description: A vintage red metal alarm clock with black bells, a white face, and visible weathering. The design is robust, with an arched handle and decorative wear patterns.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the arched red handle and two black bells, with the red body partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the white clock face with black numerals and hands, as well as the hammer between the bells.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the curved handle, black bells, and the red, weathered body.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid red, weathered back with no visible controls or openings.
